title: Search endpoint: five optional filters via dynamic-reduce
prompt: Build a complete search endpoint `MyApp.Accounts.Search.search/1` that accepts a map with any combination of: `"name"` (partial match, ilike), `"email"` (exact), `"min_age"` (int), `"max_age"` (int), `"active"` (bool). Use `Enum.reduce(params, dynamic(true), ...)` with a case-match on each key to build a single composed dynamic. Handle string-keyed params. Empty params should return all users. Unknown keys are ignored. Apply via `where: ^dynamic`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts/search.ex`.
tier_rationale: Full 5-filter dynamic search endpoint. Requires correct case-match, acc composition, type-aware handling, and the reduce pattern throughout.
research_citation: Jonny Eberhardt Medium: 'Mastering Advanced Querying in Ecto' + the reduce-with-dynamic(true) pattern
